name: RunCommand

requires_approval.description: Set to true if the command requires user approval.

description: Execute shell commands on the system. For any commands that would require user interaction, assume the user is not available to interact and pass non-interactive flags.
description_zh: 在系统上执行shell命令。对于任何需要用户交互的命令，假定用户不可用并传递非交互标志。
examples: Run with approval: command="rm -rf node_modules", requires_approval=true
examples_zh: 需要批准运行: command="rm -rf node_modules", requires_approval=true
